title: Nested corelib submodule
description:
Closed **2026-04-10** when compiler [`8fa00e9`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/8fa00e9) enforced **stdlib only from nested corelib submodule**.

**corelib-packaging** tasks: superrepo `beskid_standard` submodule, compiler-embedded `corelib` for standalone CI, stdlib artifact manifest across superrepo and pckg UI, CLI provisioning isolation, and cleanup retries. Removes duplicate in-tree `standard_library` implementations.
